S.FORM: Jaylen Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1996, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 10, Jaylen Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ajlen ő≤rown ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw / praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *ajlen ő≤rown, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
